steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject is "Anthropologist Lívia Barbosa," one person. The phrase "of the Universidade Federal Fluminense in Brazil" only describes her and does not change the subject's number.

steps.title: Match subject and verb
steps.content: B, C, and D use plural verb forms that do not agree with a singular third-person subject. The sentence needs a singular present-tense verb to agree with one anthropologist. The answer is A.
